text:
google has strong models, but its slow rollout weakens their impact

gemini 3.1 pro came out three months ago, and in that time, openai and anthropic have already pushed multiple new model releases

even smaller gemini releases, like 3.1 flash lite, took a long time to reach GA
name: Haider.

text:

potential model releases from:

> Google: Gemini 3.2 at Google I/O tomorrow

text:
Google has all the resources that are necessary to stay in the ballpark with OpenAI and Anthropic.

But this feels like a pivotal week coming up for them.

The new Gemini model needs to be right there with 5.5.

I hope they have some other major product releases planned as well. https://t.co/PLKdGo9QY8

text:
[TL;DR Daily]

A new kingpin is rising in the AI power game, and it's not OpenAI. Anthropic, supercharged by Google, Amazon, and (surprise) Musk's SpaceX, is fast outgrowing its underdog status. If you think the AI wars are just about model benchmarks, you clearly missed the
